name: Instant Pot Butter Chicken
description: Restaurant-quality Indian butter chicken in under 30 minutes. Creamy, authentic, and easy.
recipeInstructions: Place tomatoes, garlic, ginger, turmeric, cayenne, smoked paprika, salt, 1 teaspoon garam masala, and cumin in the Instant Pot. Mix well. Place chicken thighs on top of the sauce.
Close the lid and cook on high pressure for 10 minutes. Let pressure release naturally for 10 minutes, then release any remaining pressure.
Carefully remove the chicken and set aside.
Using an immersion blender, blend the sauce until smooth.
Let the sauce cool slightly. Add butter, heavy cream, cilantro, and 1 teaspoon garam masala. Stir until well incorporated.
Reserve half the sauce for future use. Add the chicken back in and heat through. Break into smaller pieces but don't shred. Serve over rice or zucchini noodles.
